app.workspace-manager.title: Workspace Manager
app.workspace-manager.empty.select: Select a workspace to view its settings
app.workspace-manager.field.name: Name
app.workspace-manager.field.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens and underscores, starting with a letter.
app.workspace-manager.field.autoStart: Start automatically when the node boots
app.workspace-manager.field.autoStartHin: When off, the workspace stays stopped at boot until you start it here.
app.workspace-manager.engines.restartNot: Engine changes take effect after the workspace is restarted.
app.workspace-manager.engines.pendingNot: Saved engine settings differ from what is running. Restart to apply.
app.workspace-manager.progress.phase.cre: Creating the "{name}" workspace. This may take a few minutes.
app.workspace-manager.progress.phase.sta: Starting the "{name}" workspace services. This may take a few minutes.
app.workspace-manager.progress.failedGen: The operation failed. See the server log for details.
app.workspace-manager.dialog.createDesc: Creates a new workspace and starts its services. The workspace name appears in URLs and cannot be changed later.
app.workspace-manager.dialog.deleteDesc: The workspace "{name}" and everything stored in it will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
